templates.title: GitHub Stars Tracker
templates.description: Fetch my starred GitHub repos, get the README for each repo, summarize each with Claude, and post a daily digest to Slack.

templates.title: Hacker News Digest
templates.description: Scrape Hacker News front page, fetch top 10 stories, summarize each with Claude, and email me the digest every morning at 8am.

templates.title: ArXiv Paper Summarizer
templates.description: Fetch latest ArXiv papers for machine learning, extract abstracts, summarize with Claude, and post the list to a Slack channel.

templates.title: Slack Standup Bot
templates.description: Every morning at 9am, post a standup reminder in Slack, collect replies from the team, summarize with Claude, and post the standup summary to the channel.

templates.title: PagerDuty Alert → Jira Ticket
templates.description: When a PagerDuty alert fires, create a Jira ticket with the incident title and link, assign to the on-call engineer, and post the ticket link in Slack.

templates.title: Stock Price Monitor
templates.description: Every hour fetch stock prices from a market API for a watchlist, compare to thresholds, and send an email alert if any stock moves more than 5%.

templates.title: Reddit Sentiment Pipeline
templates.description: Fetch top posts from selected subreddits, run sentiment analysis with Claude on comments, aggregate scores, and store results in Postgres for a dashboard.

templates.title: Daily Weather + Calendar Summary
templates.description: Fetch today's weather from a weather API and my calendar events, summarize with Claude into a single morning brief, and send by email.

templates.title: Invoice PDF to Spreadsheet
templates.description: Watch a folder for new PDF invoices, extract line items and totals with Claude, and append rows to a Google Sheet or CSV.

templates.title: Twitter/X Follower Growth Report
templates.description: Fetch follower count and recent engagement from Twitter API, compute week-over-week growth, and post a short report to Slack every Monday.

templates.title: CRM Lead Enrichment
templates.description: Pull new leads from CRM that lack company info, fetch company details from a data API, summarize with Claude, and write enriched data back to CRM.

templates.title: GitHub PR Code Review Summarizer
templates.description: Fetch open pull requests from GitHub, get diff and comments, summarize review feedback with Claude, and post the summary as a PR comment.

templates.title: Meeting Notes to Action Items
templates.description: Take raw meeting transcript or notes, extract action items and owners with Claude, and create tasks in Jira or Asana with due dates.

templates.title: Support Ticket Classifier and Router
templates.description: Fetch new support tickets from Zendesk, classify urgency and category with Claude, assign to the right team, and post a summary to Slack.

templates.title: Database Backup Verification
templates.description: Run a Postgres backup job, verify the backup file exists and checksum, run a quick restore test to a staging DB, and notify Slack on success or failure.

templates.title: API Rate Limit Monitor and Alert
templates.description: Every 5 minutes call our external API, check response headers for rate limit remaining, and send a PagerDuty alert if below 10% or post warning to Slack.

templates.title: Research Paper Citation Extractor
templates.description: Given a list of paper DOIs, fetch metadata and full text where available, extract citations with Claude, and output a structured citation graph to JSON.

templates.title: Expense Report Categorizer
templates.description: Pull uncategorized expenses from our accounting API, classify each into the right category and project with Claude, and push categorized data back.

templates.title: Log Anomaly Detector
templates.description: Fetch recent application logs from our log API, sample and summarize with Claude to detect anomalies or errors, and create a Jira ticket if critical.

templates.title: RSS Newsletter Digest
templates.description: Fetch articles from configured RSS feeds, summarize top 5 with Claude, format as a newsletter, and send via SendGrid or Mailgun to a mailing list.
